description_long: This object is a compact, freestanding cabinet with a rectangular shape and a deep, integrated sink basin on top, resembling a utility or laundry sink unit. The front features two vertical doors with metallic bar handles, and the cabinet body is finished in a dark wood or laminate veneer. A metallic faucet is mounted at the rear of the sink, and a textured purple towel hangs from a side-mounted bar. The sides and back of the cabinet are finished in a solid dark color, likely black, with minimal detailing. The overall construction suggests a sturdy, functional piece designed for utility spaces, with a combination of metal, wood, and composite materials. The object is suitable for placement in garages, laundry rooms, or utility areas in urban environments.
description: A dark wood-finished utility cabinet with a deep sink, metallic handles, and a side towel bar, designed for functional use in utility spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing two vertical doors with metallic handles and the integrated sink basin with faucet.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the metallic towel bar with a purple towel and the depth of the sink basin.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back panel and the faucet, with the towel bar visible on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a plain, featureless side panel and the edge of the sink.
